_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-810003 + SP-810020: Ransomware Kill Chain Scorer — Full Multi-Stage
scenario: Full ransomware kill chain scored by SP-810020: Initial Access → Credential Dumping → Lateral Movement → Backup Destruction → Mass Encryption

kill_chain_phases.description: PowerShell encoded command dropped and executed
PsExec lateral movement to domain controller
VSS deletion + mass file encryption begins

events.description: File rename spike: >500 files renamed to .locked within 2 minutes

kill_chain_scorer_result.note: Score >90 = CRITICAL. Score 145 indicates full kill chain.

why_tp: 6 distinct kill chain phases detected within 3 hours
LSASS memory dump confirms credential theft (high-fidelity)
Lateral movement to domain controller — blast radius expanded
VSS deletion followed by mass file rename (.locked) — active encryption confirmed
Risk score 145 far exceeds CRITICAL threshold of 90
analyst_action: IMMEDIATE: Invoke Business Continuity Plan and Ransomware Response Playbook PB-001
Isolate ALL hosts that WORKSTATION-07 has connected to since 20:00
Especially isolate DC01.contoso.com — credential exposure likely
Check backup integrity — VSS deleted, verify off-site/immutable backups exist
Do NOT pay ransom — contact legal and cyber insurance first
Preserve forensic artifacts: memory dump, event logs, disk images
